title: nepeta odorifera
intro: Nepeta odorifera, also known as catmint, is a perennial plant species in the mint family (Lamiaceae) native to the mountainous regions of Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Nepeta odorifera include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and soothing digestive issues. Nepeta odorifera can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health concerns.
